items.title: At least 30 feared dead in crush at Haitian tourist site
items.dek: The incident occurred at a "tourist event attended by many young people", Haiti's prime minister says.
items.body: The incident occurred at a "tourist event attended by many young people", Haiti's prime minister says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Texas woman sentenced to 6 years in prison for mailing inmates Bibles soaked with drugs
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'We need real peace': Easter truce fails to lift grim mood in war-torn Ukraine
items.dek: Easter festivities are muted in Kharkiv as Ukrainians expect fighting to flare up again after a weekend truce.
items.body: Easter festivities are muted in Kharkiv as Ukrainians expect fighting to flare up again after a weekend truce.
items.author: IriLine Desk
